Name: Quantitative Trading Analyst Intern
Company Description: DRW is a diversified proprietary trading firm headquartered in Chicago, operating at the intersection of trading, technology, and quantitative research. Founded in 1992, the firm trades across asset classes including fixed income, FX, equities, and digital assets, using both systematic and discretionary strategies. DRW also invests in financial market infrastructure and early-stage technologies through its venture arm. Known for its data-centric and collaborative culture, DRW has built a strong global presence in high-frequency and options trading.

Name: Intern - Quantitative Researcher
Company Description: Aqumon is a financial technology company that provides automated investment services through its proprietary robo-advisory platform. Founded in 2016 and headquartered in Hong Kong, the firm utilizes quantitative algorithms and big data analytics to offer personalized asset allocation strategies for individual and institutional investors. Aqumon focuses on lowering the barriers to entry for professional wealth management by providing low-cost, data-driven portfolio construction. The company serves clients across the Asia Pacific region and aims to make sophisticated investment management accessible through its digital interface.

Name: Summer 2027 Analyst Programme
Company Description: Bank of America is one of the largest financial institutions in the world, offering banking, investment, and wealth management services to individuals, businesses, and governments. Headquartered in Charlotte, North Carolina, the bank operates across more than 35 countries and serves tens of millions of clients globally. It has a significant presence in consumer banking, corporate and investment banking, and asset management through its Merrill and Private Bank brands. Bank of America plays a central role in US capital markets and is consistently ranked among the world’s systemically important financial institutions.

Name: Quantitative Research Analyst Intern
Company Description: Citadel is a global financial institution operating one of the world’s largest and most successful hedge funds, alongside a leading market-making business through Citadel Securities. Founded in 1990 by Kenneth Griffin and headquartered in Miami, the firm manages capital across equities, credit, commodities, and global macro strategies. Citadel is known for its research-intensive, data-driven approach and emphasis on risk management. It attracts top talent in quantitative research, software engineering, and investment analysis across its global offices.

Name: 2027 Summer Analyst Program
Company Description: Jefferies is a global investment banking and capital markets firm headquartered in New York, offering services in M&A advisory, equity and debt underwriting, research, and trading. The firm is known for its focus on the mid to upper mid-market, serving corporate clients, financial sponsors, and institutional investors across a wide range of industries. Jefferies operates with a full-service model that includes strong sector coverage, global distribution, and a growing footprint in Europe and Asia. It is particularly active in healthcare, industrials, TMT, and consumer, and is regarded as one of the top independent investment banks outside the bulge bracket. Jefferies has also expanded into asset and wealth management, and its flexible, entrepreneurial culture allows it to move quickly in competitive deal environments. With a reputation for high-touch client service and deal execution, it remains a go-to firm for high-growth companies and active sponsors.

Name: Millennium Investment Internship 2027
Company Description: Millennium Management is a global multi-manager hedge fund founded in 1989, operating a platform of independent investment teams across asset classes and geographies. Headquartered in New York, the firm manages over $60 billion in assets and allocates capital to hundreds of portfolio managers running diverse, often uncorrelated strategies. Millennium is known for its robust risk management, proprietary infrastructure, and intense focus on performance and discipline. The firm operates offices across the US, Europe, and Asia, and competes with other multi-manager funds such as Citadel and Point72. With a highly selective hiring process and rigorous oversight model, Millennium continues to be one of the most sought-after and closely watched firms in the hedge fund industry.

Name: 2027 Summer Analyst
Company Description: Goldman Sachs is one of the world’s most prestigious investment banks and financial institutions, offering a wide range of services in investment banking, asset management, global markets, consumer banking, and wealth management. Founded in 1869 and headquartered in New York, the firm serves corporations, financial institutions, governments, and individuals globally. Goldman is widely regarded for its M&A advisory, equity and debt underwriting, and institutional trading, and has been involved in many of the largest and most complex financial transactions in history. It also operates Marcus, its consumer banking platform, and has expanded into transaction banking and alternative investments. Known for its elite talent, risk culture, and thought leadership, Goldman Sachs is also increasingly focused on sustainability, digital finance, and private capital markets. It plays a key role in shaping financial innovation and global capital flows.

Name: 2027 Summer Analyst
Company Description: J.P. Morgan is the investment banking and wealth management arm of JPMorgan Chase & Co., one of the largest and most influential financial institutions globally. Headquartered in New York, the firm offers services across investment banking, commercial banking, asset and wealth management, and treasury and securities services. It is a market leader in M&A advisory, capital markets, trading, and research, serving corporate clients, financial sponsors, and governments worldwide. J.P. Morgan has a long history of innovation in financial services and is known for its global reach, balance sheet strength, and ability to execute complex, cross-border transactions. The firm plays a central role in capital allocation across public and private markets and continues to invest heavily in technology, digital banking, and sustainability initiatives. With a strong presence in London and across EMEA, it is a key player in European finance as well as global capital markets.

Name: 2027 Summer Internship
Company Description: Point72 is a global asset management firm founded by Steven A. Cohen in 2014, following the transition from SAC Capital. Headquartered in Stamford, Connecticut, the firm manages capital across multiple strategies including long/short equity, macro, systematic, and private investments. Its discretionary investing teams operate with autonomy within a multi-manager platform, while its Cubist division focuses on quantitative and algorithmic trading. Point72 also runs a venture capital arm, Point72 Ventures, investing in fintech, healthcare, and enterprise technology. With offices in major financial centres including New York, London, Tokyo, and Singapore, the firm is known for its strong emphasis on data, technology, and talent development, particularly through its structured analyst training programs like the Point72 Academy.

Name: 2027 Summer Analyst Program
Company Description: Morgan Stanley is a global financial services firm headquartered in New York, offering investment banking, wealth management, institutional securities, and asset management services. With a strong presence in both the US and international markets, the firm advises clients on mergers and acquisitions, IPOs, debt and equity financing, and strategic investments. Its institutional arm is active in trading, research, and capital markets, while its wealth management division, bolstered by the acquisition of E*TRADE, serves millions of clients globally. Morgan Stanley is widely regarded for its advisory work with corporates and financial sponsors, and it continues to invest in digital platforms, sustainability, and global expansion to maintain its position as one of the world’s top financial institutions.

Name: Associate Consultant Internship
Company Description: Bain & Company is a global management consulting firm that advises clients on strategy, operations, technology, and organisational change. Founded in 1973 in Boston, Bain works with businesses, private equity firms, and non-profits to solve high-impact problems and deliver measurable results. The firm is known for its deep client relationships, collaborative style, and experience in scaling growth strategies across sectors such as consumer goods, healthcare, finance, and tech. It operates across more than 60 offices worldwide and regularly ranks among the most desirable employers in consulting.

Name: Algorithm Developer (Quant Researcher) - 2027 Grads
Company Description: Hudson River Trading (HRT) is a quantitative trading firm headquartered in New York City, operating across global financial markets using algorithmic strategies and cutting-edge technology. Founded in 2002, HRT combines expertise in mathematics, computer science, and finance to build models that trade equities, derivatives, and other instruments at high speed and large scale. The firm maintains a flat, research-oriented structure and relies on large-scale simulations, real-time data processing, and proprietary infrastructure to execute trades across hundreds of markets. HRT is known for being secretive, highly competitive, and at the forefront of low-latency and high-frequency trading. It competes with other elite quant firms such as Citadel Securities and Jane Street and attracts top technical talent from academia and industry. HRT also invests in infrastructure development, contributing to open-source tools and operating with a long-term mindset in an industry dominated by short-term opportunities.

Name: 2027 Summer Internship
Company Description: HSBC is one of the world’s largest banking and financial services organisations, with operations in more than 60 countries and territories and headquarters in London. Founded in 1865 in Hong Kong and Shanghai, the bank provides services across retail banking, commercial banking, global banking and markets, and wealth management. HSBC is a major player in trade finance, emerging market banking, and cross-border financial services, with a strong focus on Asia, where it generates a large share of its revenue. The bank serves a diverse client base ranging from individuals and SMEs to multinational corporations and sovereign institutions. HSBC has committed to aligning its lending and investment portfolios with net-zero goals by 2050 and is actively involved in sustainable finance, digital banking, and financial inclusion. It continues to restructure its global footprint to focus on growth in Asia while streamlining less profitable operations elsewhere.

Name: Quantitative Trading/Research Internship: Summer 2027
Company Description: Susquehanna International Group is a global quantitative trading and technology firm based in the US, known for market making, proprietary trading, and quantitative research. The firm trades across asset classes including equities, options, ETFs, and fixed income, using mathematical models and high-frequency trading infrastructure. SIG is also a significant investor in venture capital through Susquehanna Growth Equity. With offices in the US, Europe, and Asia, the firm is noted for its strong internal training programs, flat structure, and heavy emphasis on probability, decision-making, and applied game theory.

Name: Summer Internship Programme 2027
Company Description: Barclays is a British multinational bank offering retail, corporate, and investment banking services across the UK and globally. With roots dating back to 1690, it has played a central role in the evolution of modern banking. Headquartered in London, the firm is a major player in global capital markets, advising on M&A, underwriting debt and equity, and providing financing solutions. Its retail and commercial divisions serve millions of customers, while its investment bank operates across Europe, the Americas, Asia, and the Middle East.

Name: 2027 Summer Internship
Company Description: UBS is a global financial services firm headquartered in Zurich, offering wealth management, investment banking, asset management, and retail banking. With a particularly strong presence in global wealth management, UBS serves high-net-worth and institutional clients across Europe, the Americas, and Asia-Pacific. The firm also operates a sizeable investment banking division and is active in advisory, capital markets, and equities trading. UBS has placed increased emphasis on sustainable investing, digital innovation, and its integrated client model following its 2023 acquisition of Credit Suisse, reshaping the landscape of European banking.

Name: 2027 Summer Internship - Trading
Company Description: DV Trading is a multi-asset proprietary trading firm headquartered in Chicago, with additional offices in Toronto, London, and Singapore. The firm trades in global futures, options, fixed income, FX, and equities using a mix of quantitative models and discretionary execution. It supports its traders with in-house risk systems, technology infrastructure, and proprietary research tools. DV Trading is known for its agility, flat structure, and strong track record in volatile and fragmented markets, including energy and interest rate derivatives.

Name: Internship for Trading & Quant Summer 2027
Company Description: Bastion Trading is a proprietary trading firm focused on providing liquidity to global financial markets. They employ a variety of strategies across asset classes, including equities, derivatives, and fixed income. The firm is known for its technology-driven approach, utilizing sophisticated algorithms and quantitative models. Bastion emphasizes risk management and seeks to achieve consistent profitability through market making and arbitrage opportunities.

Name: Trading and Research Summer Internship 2027
Company Description: Capula Investment Management is a global alternative asset manager specialising in fixed income, macro, and absolute return strategies. Founded in 2005 and headquartered in London, the firm manages capital for institutional investors such as pension funds, endowments, and sovereign wealth funds. Capula’s investment strategies are often focused on interest rate and volatility trading, and it is known for operating with a disciplined, risk-managed approach. The firm also maintains offices in Tokyo, Hong Kong, and New York.

Name: Internship, Financial Advisory
Company Description: Teneo is a global CEO advisory firm offering services in strategic communications, corporate governance, management consulting, and financial advisory. Headquartered in New York, the firm works with Fortune 500 companies, governments, and high-profile individuals on reputation management, transaction support, crisis response, and strategic planning. Teneo combines political, financial, and media expertise through its network of former senior executives, diplomats, and consultants. It often advises on boardroom-level issues including shareholder activism, M&A communications, and ESG strategy, positioning itself as a high-touch advisory partner in sensitive and complex situations.

Name: 2027 Summer Internship Program
Company Description: BlackRock is the world’s largest asset manager, overseeing trillions in assets across index funds, ETFs, active strategies, and alternatives. Founded in 1988 and headquartered in New York, the firm serves institutional, corporate, and retail investors worldwide. Its product suite includes iShares, the world’s most widely used ETF platform, and Aladdin, its proprietary risk and portfolio management system. BlackRock plays a major role in global capital markets, with influence over long-term investment trends, ESG integration, and financial technology innovation.

Name: Quantitative Researcher (Summer Internship)
Company Description: Balyasny Asset Management (BAM) is a global multi-strategy investment firm headquartered in Chicago, with additional offices in New York, London, Hong Kong, and other financial hubs. Founded in 2001, the firm manages capital across a range of public market strategies including equities, macro, credit, and quant. BAM operates through a platform model, working with a network of individual portfolio managers who run their own books under the firm's infrastructure and risk oversight. It’s known for its focus on technology, data-driven insights, and recruiting top talent across investment and research teams.

Name: Summer Analyst, 2027
Company Description: Citi (Citigroup Inc.) is a global banking group headquartered in New York, offering a wide range of financial services including consumer banking, corporate lending, wealth management, and investment banking. With operations in over 90 countries, Citi serves governments, corporations, institutions, and individuals worldwide. Its Institutional Clients Group handles global markets, treasury, and advisory services, while its retail banking and cards business is a major player in the US and international consumer finance markets. Citi is also a significant issuer of global bonds and structured finance products.
